summary: Backend integration testing for AI Roleplay Simulator. All 15 tests passed (100%). Covered catalog, auth (register/login/me/wrong-password/lockout), session flow (start/chat with Claude Sonnet 4.5, persistence, list, end with feedback JSON), voice TTS (mp3 stream) and STT (WAV upload via Whisper), and user stats. Verified real Claude Sonnet 4.5 calls via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY and OpenAI tts-1 + whisper-1 calls.

minor.issue: Returns 200 instead of 201 on resource creation — minor REST convention deviation but acceptable.

Replays entire prior user-turn history through LlmChat on every send (sequential awaits). Latency grows O(N) with conversation length; will become slow after ~10 turns. Consider sending only the latest turn (LlmChat persists session) or batching.
If raw Claude response cannot be parsed as JSON, falls back to a hard-coded 70/70/70 placeholder rather than retrying or surfacing error — silently masks LLM JSON-format failures.

action_items: Optional: optimize /api/chat/send to avoid replaying full transcript each turn (LlmChat already keeps session_id state).
Optional: when feedback JSON parsing fails, log raw text and either retry or return 502 instead of fabricating a 70-score fallback.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: chat_send replays all prior user messages via sequential `await chat.send_message(...)` inside a loop — wastes LLM calls and money, and creates 2N round-trips. Persist Claude session state once and only send the new user turn.
server.py: CORS allow_origins is built from FRONTEND_URL + hardcoded localhost; CORS_ORIGINS='*' in .env is unused. Either honor CORS_ORIGINS or remove the dead env var.
server.py: list_sessions / get_session return raw Mongo docs; messages array could be huge. Consider trimming for /sessions list (messages excluded) to reduce payload.

server.py file is 465 lines and mixes routing + LLM orchestration + voice + auth seeding. Borderline acceptable but consider splitting routes by concern (auth_routes.py, session_routes.py, voice_routes.py).
auth.py: cookies use samesite='none' + secure=True which is correct for cross-site preview domains; good.
auth.py: brute-force lockout key is `{client_ip}:{email}` — behind a reverse proxy `request.client.host` will be the proxy IP. Use X-Forwarded-For (with care) for accurate per-user IP throttling.
scenarios.py: build_system_prompt is clean and well-structured — good.
test_credentials: admin@roleplay.ai / Admin123! (verified working). Test users created dynamically with prefix test_user_*.
seed_data_creation: Test creates one dynamic user per run (test_user_<hex>@roleplay.ai) and one doctor-scenario session with chat + feedback. Not cleaned up — main agent may want a teardown fixture later if Mongo grows.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is healthy. Use /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py as regression suite. Admin login + Claude Sonnet 4.5 chat + Claude feedback JSON + OpenAI TTS (tts-1) + OpenAI Whisper STT (whisper-1) all confirmed working end-to-end against production preview URL. Total runtime ~20s.
rca of the issue: No critical bugs found. One test bug (case-mismatched email assertion) fixed by lowercasing the generated test email to match backend's email normalization behavior.
